title: lens lenticula
intro: Lens lenticula, also known as Lenten rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Helleborus genus. This evergreen perennial has medicinal properties, primarily due to its alkaloid content, which includes helleborin, hellebrin, and helleborin, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of lens lenticula include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate pain, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Lens lenticula is commonly prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried herb, and its herbal preparations are often used in folk medicine to treat colds, coughs, and respiratory issues.
